title: CUTracer Memory Address Trace Record
description: Schema for MSG_TYPE_MEM_ADDR_ACCESS (type='mem_addr_trace') - records the per-thread memory addresses accessed, captured IPOINT_BEFORE (ipoint='B'). Unlike mem_value_trace, it carries no values / mem_space / access_size.

ctx.description: CUDA context pointer in hex format

sass.description: SASS instruction string (injected by the Python TraceReader on read; not present in raw NDJSON)

trace_index.description: Sequential index of this trace record

cta.description: CTA (Cooperative Thread Array) coordinates [x, y, z]

pc.description: Instruction byte offset within the kernel function (hex). This is not an absolute virtual address; combine with func_addr from kernel_metadata to get the runtime address.

addrs.description: Memory addresses accessed by each of the 32 threads in the warp.
